'''tawama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wumph|wumph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wumph|wumph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tawama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæwæmæth|tæwæmæth]] || [[word:tæwæmæj|tæwæmæj]] || [[word:tæwæmæsh|tæwæmæsh]] || [[word:tæwæmæ|tæwæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tawawamath|tawawamath]] || [[word:tawawamaj|tawawamaj]] || [[word:tawawamash|tawawamash]] || [[word:tawawama|tawawama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tawamath|tawamath]] || [[word:tawamaj|tawamaj]] || [[word:tawamash|tawamash]] || [[word:tawama|tawama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tawafmath|tawafmath]] || [[word:tawafmaj|tawafmaj]] || [[word:tawafmash|tawafmash]] || [[word:tawafmaf|tawafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tawamatha|tawamatha]] || [[word:tawamaja|tawamaja]] || [[word:tawamasha|tawamasha]] || [[word:tawamaka|tawamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tawamath|tawamath]] || [[word:tawamaj|tawamaj]] || [[word:tawamash|tawamash]] || [[word:tawama|tawama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tawamathal|tawamathal]] || [[word:tawamajal|tawamajal]] || [[word:tawamashal|tawamashal]] || [[word:tawamakal|tawamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tawamathatha|tawamathatha]] || [[word:tawamajaja|tawamajaja]] || [[word:tawamashasha|tawamashasha]] || [[word:tawamaka|tawamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tawamathan|tawamathan]] || [[word:tawamajan|tawamajan]] || [[word:tawamashan|tawamashan]] || [[word:tawamakan|tawamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tawamathaoro|tawamathaoro]] || [[word:tawamajaoro|tawamajaoro]] || [[word:tawamashaoro|tawamashaoro]] || [[word:tawamakaoro|tawamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
